TopModule.BindInstances: A_row_U B_col_U icmp_ln18_fu_263_p2 add_ln18_fu_269_p2 empty_26_fu_291_p2 icmp_ln20_fu_316_p2 add_ln20_fu_322_p2 control_s_axi_U gmem_a_m_axi_U gmem_b_m_axi_U gmem_c_m_axi_U

field.name: Enable
field.description: Master enable for the device interrupt output to the system interrupt controller: 0 = Disabled, 1 = Enabled

field.name: CHAN0_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 0 (ap_done) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 0 interrupt, 1 = Channel 0 interrupt.

field.name: CHAN1_INT_ST
field.description: Channel 1 (ap_ready) Interrupt Status. 0 = No Channel 1 interrupt, 1 = Channel 1 interrupt.

table.keys: Interface, Read/Write, Data Width (SW->HW), Address Width, Latency, Offset, Register, Max Widen Bitwidth, Max Read Burst Length, Max Write Burst Length, Num Read Outstanding, Num Write Outstanding, Resource Estimate
Interface, Data Width, Address Width, Offset, Register
Interface, Register, Offset, Width, Access, Description, Bit Fields
table.column: CTRL, 0x00, 32, RW, Control signals, 0=AP_START 1=AP_DONE 2=AP_IDLE 3=AP_READY 7=AUTO_RESTART 9=INTERRUPT
GIER, 0x04, 32, RW, Global Interrupt Enable Register, 0=Enable
IP_IER, 0x08, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Enable Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_EN 1=CHAN1_INT_EN
IP_ISR, 0x0c, 32, RW, IP Interrupt Status Register, 0=CHAN0_INT_ST 1=CHAN1_INT_ST
a_1, 0x10, 32, W, Data signal of a,
a_2, 0x14, 32, W, Data signal of a,
b_1, 0x1c, 32, W, Data signal of b,
b_2, 0x20, 32, W, Data signal of b,
c_1, 0x28, 32, W, Data signal of c,
c_2, 0x2c, 32, W, Data signal of c,
clock, ap_clk
reset, ap_rst_n
interrupt, interrupt
ap_ctrl_hs,
in, int const *
in, int const *
out, int*

table.keys: Argument, HW Interface, HW Type, HW Usage, HW Info

section.name: M_AXI Burst Information
section.HEADER_NOTE: Note: All burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

table.keys: HW Interface, Direction, Length, Width, Loop, Loop Location
table.column: read, 16, 512, load_ab_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:23:7
write, 256, 32, row_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:18:3

table.keys: HW Interface, Variable, Access Location, Direction, Burst Status, Length, Loop, Loop Location, Resolution, Problem
table.column: a, matmul_row_col.cpp:25:13, read, Widened, 1, load_ab_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:23:7, ,
a, matmul_row_col.cpp:25:13, read, Fail, , col_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:20:5, 214-230, Stride is incompatible
a, matmul_row_col.cpp:25:13, read, Inferred, 16, load_ab_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:23:7, ,

b, matmul_row_col.cpp:26:20, read, Widen Fail, , load_ab_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:23:7, 214-353, Could not widen since type <16 x i32> size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 512
b, matmul_row_col.cpp:26:20, read, Fail, , col_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:20:5, 214-229, Could not analyze pattern
b, matmul_row_col.cpp:26:20, read, Inferred, 16, load_ab_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:23:7, ,
c, matmul_row_col.cpp:38:33, write, Widen Fail, , col_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:20:5, 214-353, Could not widen since type i32 size is greater than or equal to the max_widen_bitwidth threshold of 32
c, matmul_row_col.cpp:38:33, write, Inferred, 256, row_loop, matmul_row_col.cpp:18:3, ,

Pragma.options: m_axi port=a offset=slave bundle=gmem_a depth=MATRIX_SIZE max_read_burst_length=1 max_widen_bitwidth=512
m_axi port=b offset=slave bundle=gmem_b depth=MATRIX_SIZE max_read_burst_length=16 max_widen_bitwidth=512
m_axi port=c offset=slave bundle=gmem_c depth=OUTPUT_SIZE max_write_burst_length=1 max_widen_bitwidth=32
